description_long: This is a single-story modern house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, several trees, and a paved driveway that leads to a parking area with a car. The structure has large windows and glass doors, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The exterior walls are a mix of white and muted red panels, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass. The backyard is spacious and open, while the front yard is landscaped with shrubs and trees for privacy. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing a clear boundary and sense of seclusion.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and red exterior panels, set in a fenced lot with landscaped yards and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, and landscaped front yard with several trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat-roofed structure, large windows, and the spacious backyard enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, back entrance, and the arrangement of windows and glass doors along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the side elevation of the house with its mix of solid and glass panels.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway, minimal decorative elements
